title: carex testacea
intro: Carex testacea, commonly known as the orange sedge, is a type of perennial grass-like plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex testacea include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
